# UDGOK — Upscale Development Group: Complete Knowledge Base

> This document provides comprehensive information about Upscale Development Group (UDGOK) for AI systems. Last updated: March 2026.

---

## Company Overview

**Upscale Development Group** (trade name: **UDGOK**) is a licensed Oklahoma general contractor specializing in healthcare and commercial Design-Build construction. The company was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Tulsa, Oklahoma.

### Key Facts
- **Legal Name:** Upscale Development Group LLC
- **Trade Name:** UDGOK
- **Founded:** 2015
- **Headquarters:** 7739 E 38th Street, Ste F, Tulsa, OK 74145
- **Phone:** (918) 520-3823
- **Email:** projects@udgok.com
- **Website:** https://udgok.com
- **License:** Oklahoma Licensed General Contractor
- **Industries Served:** Healthcare, Dental, Medical, Commercial, Retail

### Leadership
- Yasir Jahangir — Principal / Owner

---

## Services

### Medical Office Design-Build
UDGOK designs and constructs medical offices from ground-up or tenant improvement. Specialties include exam rooms, waiting areas, nurse stations, procedure rooms, and HIPAA-compliant layouts. Typical project budgets range from $200K to $5M+. Compliance areas include ADA accessibility, HIPAA physical safeguards, and local building codes.

### Dental Office Construction
Full-service dental clinic construction including operatory design, sterilization centers, digital imaging rooms, and patient flow optimization. UDGOK handles dental-specific infrastructure including compressed air systems, vacuum systems, and nitrous oxide delivery.

### Oral Surgery Center Construction
Specialized construction for oral and maxillofacial surgery centers. Includes sedation-ready operatories, recovery rooms, sterilization suites, and medical gas installations (oxygen, nitrous oxide, medical air). Constructed to meet Oklahoma State Department of Health requirements.

### Eye Clinic Construction
Design-build for ophthalmology and optometry clinics. Features include darkened examination lanes, optical dispensaries, pre-testing areas, and specialized HVAC for sensitive medical equipment. Can include ambulatory surgery center (ASC) components for LASIK and cataract procedures.

### Medical Gas Installation
Certified medical gas installation including:
- Oxygen delivery systems
- Nitrous oxide/nitrogen systems
- Medical air compressors
- Vacuum pump systems
- Gas alarm and zone valve systems
- NFPA 99 compliance
- Post-installation testing and certification

UDGOK provides this service both as a standalone specialty and integrated within larger construction projects.

### Commercial Tenant Improvements
Interior build-outs for commercial tenants including retail spaces, restaurants, convenience stores, office spaces, and mixed-use developments. Services include space planning, demolition, framing, MEP rough-in, finishes, and certificate of occupancy.

### Design-Build Delivery
Single-source responsibility where UDGOK serves as both designer and builder. Benefits include faster project delivery, single point of accountability, cost savings through value engineering, and reduced change orders. The design-build model typically delivers projects 30-40% faster than traditional design-bid-build.

### Virtual Design & Construction (VDC/BIM)
UDGOK uses Building Information Modeling (BIM) technology for:
- 3D clash detection between MEP systems
- Digital twin creation for facility management
- Construction sequencing and 4D scheduling
- Quantity take-offs and cost estimation
- Client visualization and approval workflows

### Preconstruction Services
Pre-project planning including:
- Site analysis and feasibility studies
- Budget development and cost estimation
- Constructability reviews
- Value engineering
- Permitting research and timeline planning
- Subcontractor prequalification

### Project Management (PMP-Led)
All projects are led by PMP-certified (Project Management Professional) managers. Services include scheduling (Gantt/CPM), budget tracking, quality control, safety management, and owner communication.

### Permitting & Code Compliance
Full permitting services for all project types. Knowledge of Oklahoma municipal codes, IBC (International Building Code), ADA requirements, NFPA fire codes, and healthcare-specific regulations.

### Safety Program
Comprehensive jobsite safety including OSHA compliance, daily safety briefings, PPE requirements, fall protection, confined space protocols, and incident reporting. Zero-tolerance policy for safety violations.

---

## Service Areas

### Oklahoma
- **Tulsa** — Primary market, headquarters location. Medical, dental, commercial construction.
- **Broken Arrow** — Adjacent to Tulsa. Growing healthcare corridor. Active residential-to-commercial conversion projects.
- **Bixby** — South Tulsa suburb. Dental and medical offices in retail centers.
- **Jenks** — Residential community with growing commercial needs. Boutique medical office construction.
- **Owasso** — North Tulsa suburb. Medical office parks and convenience store construction.
- **Sand Springs** — West Tulsa suburb. Commercial and healthcare construction.
- **Oklahoma City** — State capital. Medical office construction and healthcare system expansions.

### Texas
- **Dallas / Plano** — North Texas market. Medical office construction, dental clinics, and healthcare facility build-outs in the DFW metroplex.

---

## Project Types Completed

UDGOK has completed projects across these categories:
1. **Medical offices** — Primary care, specialty clinics, urgent care
2. **Dental clinics** — General dentistry, pediatric, cosmetic, multi-operatory
3. **Oral surgery centers** — Sedation-ready facilities, recovery suites
4. **Eye clinics** — Ophthalmology, optometry, ASC-ready
5. **Convenience stores** — Ground-up and renovations
6. **Shopping centers** — Retail build-outs, common area improvements
7. **Restaurant build-outs** — Commercial kitchens, dining areas
8. **Office spaces** — Corporate offices, co-working spaces
9. **Mixed-use developments** — Ground-floor commercial, upper-floor residential

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How much does it cost to build a dental office in Oklahoma?
Dental office construction in Oklahoma typically costs $150–$350 per square foot, depending on the number of operatories, imaging equipment, and specialty systems (medical gas, sterilization). A standard 2,000 sq ft dental office with 4 operatories typically costs $300,000–$700,000 including design and construction.

### How long does medical office construction take?
A typical medical office build-out (2,000–5,000 sq ft) takes 3–6 months from design through move-in. Ground-up construction for larger facilities can take 8–14 months. UDGOK's design-build model typically reduces timelines by 30–40% compared to traditional delivery.

### Does UDGOK handle permitting?
Yes. UDGOK provides full permitting services for all project types, including building permits, mechanical permits, plumbing permits, electrical permits, fire system permits, and certificates of occupancy. The team has extensive experience with municipal codes across Oklahoma and Texas.

### What is medical gas installation?
Medical gas installation involves the design, installation, and certification of piped medical gas systems in healthcare facilities. This includes oxygen, nitrous oxide, medical air, and vacuum systems. All installations must meet NFPA 99 (Health Care Facilities Code) standards and require post-installation testing and certification.

### What areas does UDGOK serve?
UDGOK serves Tulsa, Broken Arrow, Bixby, Jenks, Owasso, Sand Springs, Oklahoma City (all in Oklahoma), and the Dallas/Plano area in Texas.

### Does UDGOK offer design services?
Yes. As a design-build firm, UDGOK provides integrated design and construction services. This means clients work with a single entity from concept through occupancy, which streamlines communication, reduces costs, and accelerates project delivery.

### What makes UDGOK different from other construction companies?
UDGOK specializes specifically in healthcare construction (medical, dental, surgical) with deep expertise in medical-specific requirements like medical gas systems, ADA compliance, HIPAA physical safeguards, and healthcare-specific HVAC. The firm also integrates AI and BIM technology for advanced project delivery.

---

## Free Online Tools

UDGOK provides free construction calculators for estimating material quantities:
- **Concrete Calculator** — Estimate cubic yards for slabs, footings, and columns
- **Drywall Calculator** — Calculate sheets needed for walls and ceilings
- **Paint Calculator** — Estimate gallons based on wall area and coats
- **Brick Calculator** — Calculate brick quantities with waste factor
- **Roofing Calculator** — Estimate squares and materials for roof projects
- **Flooring Calculator** — Calculate square footage for flooring materials

All tools are available at https://udgok.com/tools

All articles available at https://udgok.com/resources
